name: General Raiho of the Ice Barrier

desc: When your opponent's monster effect activated on the field resolves, they must discard 1 card or the effect is negated (their choice).
mnst_eff: When your opponent's monster effect activated on the field resolves, they must discard 1 card or the effect is negated (their choice).
eff: When your opponent's monster effect activated on the field resolves, they must discard 1 card or the effect is negated (their choice).

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
